description: Progress state for resource yield (generation) workflow. Emitted as SSE events on yield:progress and yield:finished channels.

correlationId.description: Echoes the correlationId from the originating yield:request command, if any. Lets clients match progress events back to the operation that initiated them.

referenceId.description: ID of the reference annotation that triggered generation

resourceName.description: Name of the resource being generated

resourceId.description: ID of the generated resource (available after creation)

sourceResourceId.description: ID of the source resource containing the reference
